Verified via task.json instructions ('Filter large structures down to: 40 pixels').
Verified via task.json instructions ('Filter small structures up to: 3 pixels').

privileged_info_summary: The task requires applying an FFT Bandpass Filter to a real NASA Ultraviolet Imaging Telescope (UIT) sample image of NGC4151 (UITfuv2582gc.fits). The filter parameters must be exactly 40 pixels for large structures and 3 pixels for small structures. The target image is located at /home/ga/AstroImages/raw/uit_galaxy_sample.fits, and outputs must be saved to /home/ga/AstroImages/processed/uit_bandpass_filtered.fits and /home/ga/AstroImages/processed/filter_report.txt. The data is real and originates from NASA GSFC FITS samples, containing a (512, 512) array of intensified film data.
